easter-cheesecake-argiro.name: Easter Cheesecake

ingredients.item: 10-12 fresh onions with their green leaves
6 eggs seasoned the yolk from the white
A little olive oil for the baking pan
10-12 fresh onions with their green leaves
6 eggs seasoned the yolk from the white
A little olive oil for the baking pan

instructions: Wash well and dry all the vegetarians we will use for the Easter cheese pie.
Fine chop the pubkins and the fresh onions separately and then the leek.
In pan heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the leek and fresh versions, allowing them to soften slightly for 10 minutes.
Add the pumpkin and let it wither and absorb its liquids. Remove from heat and allow the vegetarians to cool for 5–6 minutes.
In a large bowl, mix the salted vegetarians, yolks, milk, flour, baking powder, cheeses, herbs, salt and pepper until homogenized.
In a mixer, beat the whites in meringue until soft drinks are formed (about 2 minutes). Gentle added the meringue to the other ingredients and mix with gentlemen moves so that it doesn't get down.

Pour the mixture into a well oiled long fireproof bowl and baking in a well preheated oven: 170°C in the resistors for 45 minutes, until golden and stabilized, or 160°C in the air on the medium grill for about 35 minutes.
Allow it to cool before cutting into slides and serve.

egg-and-tomato-salad-argiro.name: Egg And Tomato Salad
instructions: For the salad with eggs and tomato, mix all the actives together in a large bowl to combine the flavors.
Mix careful so that the built eggs are not dissolved.
Let the egg salad stand for 10 minutes before serving.
It's an amazing snack with toasted bread!
Also, we can add two anchovies chopped for a more spy taste.
This easy recipe is ideal for us to use the boated eggs left over, or the Easter eggs that we were not painted well, or brown during evening.

einkorn-banana-bread.name: Einkorn Banana Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9x5-inch loaf pan.
Stir sugar and melted butter together in a bowl. Mix in eggs, milk, and vanilla until well combined.

Combine sifted flour, cinnamon, baking soda, baking powder, and salt in a separate bowl. Stir flour mixture into butter mixture until smooth. Fold bananas and walnuts into the batter until fully incorporated. Spread batter evenly into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of the loaf reads 91°C (90 degrees C), about 55 minutes.
Remove from the oven and cool in the pan for 10 minutes. Remove loaf from the pan and finish cooling on a wire rack.

enjoy-these-delicious-zucchini-and-chick.name: Enjoy These Delicious Zucchini And Chicken Skewers
enjoy-these-delicious-zucchini-and-chick.original_name: Disfruta estas deliciosas brochetas de calabacín y pollo
instructions: He starts his recipe and takes his chicken breast. Cut into medium cubes or as big as you like.
Toma los dientes de ajo, pela y filetea muy bien.
Put chicken breast into a bowl and add mustard, paprika, oregano, salt and pepper to suit. Also garlic teeth. It's a good mix and it's about 10 minutes.
It proceeds and takes pumpkins. Wash and remove the tipples from both sides. Cut into thick slices, this will allow them to stay sealed and fall apart.
Place pumpkin shells into a bowl, with salt and pepper to suit and add olive oil. That's a good mix.
Calienta una plancha o grill. Toma las brochetas o pinchos y vas a insertar el pollo condimentado junto al vegetal de forma intercalada.
Una vez armadas las brochetas, lleva al grill o a la plancha y sella por 8 minutos de ambos lados.
Las brochetas deben quedar bien jugosas pero selladas.
Retira del grill o plancha y disfruta como desees.

ever-sour-cream-lasagna.name: Ever Sour Cream Lasagna
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Cook sausage, ground beef, and garlic in a large skillet over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Drain any excess grease.

Stir in diced tomatoes, tomato sauce, parsley, basil, oregano, and sugar. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer, stirring occasionally, until thickened, about 30 minutes.

When the sauce has simmered for about 15 minutes, bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Add lasagna noodles and cook, uncovered, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 8 minutes. Drain.
Stir sour cream, 1/2 of the mozzarella, Parmesan, olives, eggs, salt, and pepper together in a bowl.

Assemble the lasagna: Spread a thin layer of meat sauce evenly over the bottom of a 9x13-inch baking dish. Cover with 1/3 of the lasagna noodles, 1/3 of the remaining meat sauce, and 1/3 of the cheese mixture; repeat layers two more times with remaining noodles, sauce, and cheese mixture. Sprinkle remaining mozzarella evenly over top.
Bake in the preheated oven until sauce is bubbly and the cheese is golden brown, about 30 minutes.
